verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ
verses.text: By the sky and the night visitor!
And what will make you know what the night visitor is?

verses.quran_arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌۭ
verses.text: Over every person (there is) a watcher.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
canonical_variants.english: Every self has a preserver over it.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
canonical_variants.english: Every self has a preserver over it.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
canonical_variants.english: Every self has a preserver over it.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
canonical_variants.english: Every self has a preserver over it.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: Every self has a preserver over it.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٖ لَّمَا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: Every self has a preserver over it.

verses.text: So let the human consider: what was he created from?
He was created from spurting water.
It comes forth from (a place) between the spine and the ribs.
Surely He is able indeed to bring him back,
on the Day when (all) secrets will be examined,

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍۢ وَلَا نَاصِرٍۢ
verses.text: and he will have no power (and) no helper.
By the sky full of returning (rain),
by the earth full of cracks!
Surely it is a decisive word indeed!
Surely they are hatching a plot,
but I (too) am hatching a plot.
So let the disbelievers be, let them be for a little (while).
